title: BetterMSG
body:
![Slogan](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/52ec932e31e9455d7c2457297d7e935e77588066.png) > Transform your server's chat with color codes, custom prefixes, and granular permission control — all in one lightweight plugin. --- ## ⚡ Features ### 🎨 Color Codes in Messages Players can use Minecraft's standard color codes (`&a`, `&b`, `&c`, ...) directly in chat — making conversations more vibrant and expressive than ever. ### 🏷️ Custom Prefixes Give players or groups unique prefixes to reflect their role on the server. Configure them via in-game commands or the config file — no restart needed. ### 🔐 Permission Management Fine-grained control over who can use what: - Restrict color codes to specific ranks - Enable or disable messaging features per player - Keep your chat clean and abuse-free ### 📜 User-Friendly Commands Simple, intuitive commands to manage everything on the fly. Reload the config without restarting your server — changes apply instantly. --- ## 🛠️ Installation 1. Download the `.jar` file 2. Drop it into your server's `/plugins` folder 3. Restart your server 4. Customize via `/plugins/BetterMSG/config.yml` 5. Done! ✅ --- ## 🔧 Compatibility | Minecraft Version | Supported | |:-----------------:|:---------:| | 1.21.x | ✅ | | 1.20.x | ✅ | | 1.19.x | ✅ | | 1.18.x | ✅ | | 1.17.x | ✅ | | 1.16.x | ✅ | | 1.15.x | ✅ | | 1.14.x | ✅ | | 1.13.x | ✅ | | Older | ❌ | > **Server Software:** Bukkit · Spigot · Paper --- ## 🔗 Source Code This plugin is **open source**! Contributions and feedback are welcome. 👉 [View on GitHub](https://github.com/larroxtv/BetterMSG) --- ## 💬 Support & Feedback Found a bug or have an idea? Open a GitHub issue — every bit of feedback helps improve the plugin! ---
*Made with ❤️ by Larrox*
